chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1720 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.2659/2025 (C/A) 30-09-2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali alias Raza Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner by filing statement places on record disability certificate of the Petitioner, same is taken on record. Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the listed application and submits that the Petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
